policy: News only. Model changes require owner approval.

items.headline: V: W-6 in orbit—autonomous navigation reentry flight updates
items.summary: Varda posted that W-6 is now in orbit, describing its 2026 flight manifest and autonomous hypersonic reentry focus. The update highlights payload elements and data collection for navigation and thermal protection.

items.headline: O: ChatGPT release notes—o3 retirement and GPT-4.5 sunset
items.summary: ChatGPT release notes indicate o3 retirement on 2026-08-26 after a 90-day sunset, and GPT-4.5 retirement on 2026-06-26 after a 30-day sunset. This signals model lifecycle changes affecting product availability.

items.headline: O: Jalapeño inference chip unveiled with G
items.summary: O and Broadcom unveiled “Jalapeño,” O’s first Intelligence Processor built for LLM inference. The release frames it as an accelerator in a multi-generation compute platform for faster, more reliable inference at scale.

items.headline: G: $650M growth capital for GCloud expansion
items.summary: G announced $650M in new growth capital to scale its AI inference cloud, stating the funding will accelerate expansion of GCloud and infrastructure scaling. The release also references leadership appointments in July.

items.headline: O: acquire Ona—Codex team deal announced
items.summary: O announced an agreement to acquire Ona. The release notes the deal is subject to customary closing conditions, including regulatory approvals, and positions Ona’s team within O’s Codex work.
